tasks.subject: Task 1: Deprecate inactive routes and cache types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `/** @deprecated */` to every inactive controller method and cache class.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/UserController.php` (getInfo, getConfigs, getInfoV2)
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/VersionController.php` (changelog, download)
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/CacheController.php` (getHashes)
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/CapeController.php` (all 8 methods)
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/GuildController.php` (setColor)
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/TelemetryController.php` (sendGatheringSpot)
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/PatreonController.php` (webhook, list)
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/WebhookController.php` (github)
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/LegacyApiController.php` (all 8 methods)
- Modify: `app/Http/Libraries/Requests/Cache/GatheringSpots.php`
- Modify: `app/Http/Libraries/Requests/Cache/IngredientList.php`
- Modify: `app/Http/Libraries/Requests/Cache/ItemList.php`
- Modify: `app/Http/Libraries/Requests/Cache/MapLocations.php`
- Modify: `app/Http/Libraries/Requests/Cache/TerritoryList.php`
- Modify: `app/Http/Libraries/Requests/Cache/GuildListWithColors.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All inactive controller methods have `/** @deprecated */`
- [ ] All six inactive cache classes have `/** @deprecated */` above `class`
- [ ] `php artisan scramble:export` runs without errors
- [ ] `api.json` contains `"deprecated": true` for each marked route

**Verify:** `php artisan scramble:export && grep -c '"deprecated": true' api.json` → count ≥ 20

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Http/Controllers/UserController.php","app/Http/Controllers/VersionController.php","app/Http/Controllers/CacheController.php","app/Http/Controllers/CapeController.php","app/Http/Controllers/GuildController.php","app/Http/Controllers/TelemetryController.php","app/Http/Controllers/PatreonController.php","app/Http/Controllers/WebhookController.php","app/Http/Controllers/LegacyApiController.php","app/Http/Libraries/Requests/Cache/GatheringSpots.php","app/Http/Libraries/Requests/Cache/IngredientList.php","app/Http/Libraries/Requests/Cache/ItemList.php","app/Http/Libraries/Requests/Cache/MapLocations.php","app/Http/Libraries/Requests/Cache/TerritoryList.php","app/Http/Libraries/Requests/Cache/GuildListWithColors.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan scramble:export && grep -c '\"deprecated\": true' api.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All inactive controller methods have @deprecated","All six inactive cache classes have @deprecated","scramble:export runs without errors","api.json contains deprecated:true for each marked route"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Update UserResource and UserController::getInfoPost
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite `UserResource::toArray()` to the minimal getInfoPost shape and update `getInfoPost` to return the resource directly.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/Http/Resources/UserResource.php`
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/UserController.php`
- Create: `tests/Feature/ResourceSchemaTest.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `POST /user/getInfo` returns `{user: {accountType, cosmetics: {hasCape, hasElytra, hasEars, texture}}}`
- [ ] `getInfoPost` return type is `UserResource`
- [ ] `UserResource::toArray()` has typed `@return` PHPDoc
- [ ] Test passes

**Verify:** `php artisan test --filter=ResourceSchemaTest::test_get_info_returns_user_resource_shape`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Http/Resources/UserResource.php","app/Http/Controllers/UserController.php","tests/Feature/ResourceSchemaTest.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan test --filter=ResourceSchemaTest::test_get_info_returns_user_resource_shape", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST /user/getInfo returns correct minimal shape","getInfoPost return type is UserResource","UserResource::toArray() has typed @return PHPDoc"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Create Auth resources and update AuthController
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `PublicKeyResource` and `AuthResponseResource`, update both AuthController methods to return them.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/Http/Resources/PublicKeyResource.php`
- Create: `app/Http/Resources/AuthResponseResource.php`
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/AuthController.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `GET /auth/getPublicKey` schema includes `publicKeyIn: string`
- [ ] `POST /auth/responseEncryption` schema includes `message`, `authToken`, `configFiles`, `hashes`
- [ ] Both controller methods return their resource directly

**Verify:** `php artisan scramble:export && grep -A 5 '"publicKeyIn"' api.json`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Http/Resources/PublicKeyResource.php","app/Http/Resources/AuthResponseResource.php","app/Http/Controllers/AuthController.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan scramble:export && grep -A 5 '\"publicKeyIn\"' api.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getPublicKey schema includes publicKeyIn","responseEncryption schema includes message/authToken/configFiles/hashes","Both methods return resource directly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Create Version resources and update VersionController
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `VersionResource` and `ChangelogBetweenResource`, update `latest` and `changelogBetween`.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/Http/Resources/VersionResource.php`
- Create: `app/Http/Resources/ChangelogBetweenResource.php`
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/VersionController.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `GET /version/latest/{stream}` schema includes `version`, `url`, `md5`, `changelog`, optional `supportedMcVersion`
- [ ] `GET /v2/version/changelog/{v1}/{v2}` schema includes `from`, `to`, `changelogs`
- [ ] Existing `VersionControllerTest` still passes

**Verify:** `php artisan test --filter=VersionControllerTest && php artisan scramble:export && grep -A 5 '"supportedMcVersion"' api.json`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Http/Resources/VersionResource.php","app/Http/Resources/ChangelogBetweenResource.php","app/Http/Controllers/VersionController.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan test --filter=VersionControllerTest && php artisan scramble:export && grep -A 5 '\"supportedMcVersion\"' api.json", "acceptanceCriteria": ["version/latest schema correct","v2/version/changelog schema correct","VersionControllerTest still passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Create CrashReportResource and update CrashReportController
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create `CrashReportResource` and update `CrashReportController::report` to return it.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/Http/Resources/CrashReportResource.php`
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/CrashReportController.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `POST /crash/report` schema includes `message: string` and `hash: string`
- [ ] `report()` return type is `CrashReportResource`

**Verify:** `php artisan scramble:export && grep -A 8 '"report"' api.json | grep '"hash"'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Http/Resources/CrashReportResource.php","app/Http/Controllers/CrashReportController.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan scramble:export && grep -A 8 '\"report\"' api.json | grep '\"hash\"'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["crash/report schema includes message and hash","report() return type is CrashReportResource"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Create cache resource classes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create one typed resource class per active cache type in `app/Http/Resources/Cache/`.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/Http/Resources/Cache/GuildListCacheResource.php`
- Create: `app/Http/Resources/Cache/ItemWeightsCacheResource.php`
- Create: `app/Http/Resources/Cache/LeaderboardCacheResource.php`
- Create: `app/Http/Resources/Cache/ServerListCacheResource.php`
- Create: `app/Http/Resources/Cache/TerritoryListCacheResource.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All five classes exist with namespace `App\Http\Resources\Cache`
- [ ] Each `toArray()` has typed `@return` PHPDoc matching actual generate() shape
- [ ] All classes instantiate without errors

**Verify:** `php artisan tinker --execute="new App\Http\Resources\Cache\ServerListCacheResource([]); echo 'ok';"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Http/Resources/Cache/GuildListCacheResource.php","app/Http/Resources/Cache/ItemWeightsCacheResource.php","app/Http/Resources/Cache/LeaderboardCacheResource.php","app/Http/Resources/Cache/ServerListCacheResource.php","app/Http/Resources/Cache/TerritoryListCacheResource.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan tinker --execute=\"new App\\Http\\Resources\\Cache\\ServerListCacheResource([]); echo 'ok';\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All five classes exist with correct namespace","Each toArray() has typed @return PHPDoc","All classes instantiate without errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Wire cache resources into CacheController
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update `CacheController::getCache` and `getCacheV2` to wrap responses in the appropriate resource via a name→class dispatch map.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/Http/Controllers/CacheController.php`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] getCache wraps known cache names in their resource class
- [ ] getCacheV2 wraps territoryList in TerritoryListCacheResource
- [ ] Cache-Control, ETag, and timestamp headers still present
- [ ] `php artisan scramble:export` completes without errors

**Verify:** `php artisan scramble:export`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/Http/Controllers/CacheController.php"], "verifyCommand": "php artisan scramble:export", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getCache wraps known cache names in their resource","getCacheV2 wraps territoryList in TerritoryListCacheResource","Cache-Control/ETag/timestamp headers preserved","scramble:export completes without errors"]}
```
